name: mikser-io
description: Claude Code plugins for the mikser-io content engine — skills that bootstrap mikser-io into Vue, React, and SvelteKit projects, and generate Zod schemas from existing document shape.

plugins.name: mikser-io-claude-plugin
plugins.description: Bootstrap a mikser-io content backend into Vue 3, React 18+/19, or SvelteKit projects — detects the framework (or scaffolds a fresh starter), wires the matching SDK, optionally lays down a starter content tree.
